sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6668" key="a)nakampte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακαμπ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n6668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must return,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.98</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:29:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.29.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
